texts.full_text: All is tranquil as the sun passes her mantle to the rising moon. We are serenaded not only by the Rain Quails’ ditty but by a chorus of frogs and crickets as well. Farmers and their water buffalo slosh back to their huts about half a mile downstream of us. Yet they can be heard as though a mere stone’s throw away. For the first time in this journey, Dad puts his arm around my shoulders, warming my heart as nothing else can. He points to a vacant hut, with a kerosene lamp glowing in the window. Leaning into the security of his strong shoulder, I nod and take a moment to consider the significance of this place. Both to him and Mom. “We start at daybreak.” He takes our bags and approaches the hut. “Let’s settle in.” As I follow him int

texts.full_text: am a C/C++ developer and I have started learning assembly language programming with the goal to become a malware analyst. I know it is not enough to just know how to read assembly to become a malware analyst. But won't it help a lot and make the remaining things easier? A: To be a malware analyst, the minimum knowledge typically needed is: Assembly language Operating system internals Deobfuscation and anti-anti-debugging techniques Obviously, there are other useful areas of knowledge for malware analysis (like an understanding of network protocols, exploit analysis techniques, knowledge of VB P-code and JavaScript and .NET languages, etc.), but it looks like you're making progress ;) Most of the things you'll need to know you'll learn along the way. For example, you may come across a malware sample that exploits Adobe Flash player. This will give you the opportunity to learn about the SWF file format, ActionScript source and bytecode, etc. A: FROM SANS.ORG When discussing malware analysis, There is 3 main phases of the process: behavioral analysis, code analysis and memory analysis. Here's a brief outline of each phase: Behavioral analysis examines the1. Behavioral Analysis - This stage involves examining how the malware behaves when executed in different environments to identify its capabilities such as network communication, file access and system interaction . Understanding what actions a piece o fmalicious software takes can help researchers determine whether it is benign or harmful 2. Code analysis- In this phase ,analysts examine the malware' s code structure assembly language syntax to understand its inner workings including any obfuscation techniques used t protect itself from detection . Analyzing th ecode helps identify possible vulnerabilities that could be exploited by attackers 3. Memory Analysis - This stage involves examining memory dumps of the malware s execution environment looking for suspicious patterns or artifacts indicative o fmalicious activity such as API calls made outs

texts.full_text: on the 0.3m f/6.3 Schmidt-Cassegrain telescope of his garden observatory located in Great Shefford, England. With the astrometry from these images, and another set from the Spacewatch II telescope on October 23, JPL was able to remove the last predicted impact solutions. On the left panel in the picture above, the images have been stacked to compensate the motion of the NEO, moving 2.1" per minute in PA 230&deg. Most of the trails in the image were caused by field stars, but to the lower right of 2004 TD18 there is a trail in a somewhat different direction: It was caused by another minor planet, (42454) 4134 T-3. The trail of that 16mag main belter easily shows up in the middle panel, where the images have been stacked without compensating for any motion - but the faint NEO, of course, is lost now. In the right panels, the frames were stacked to compensate for the motion of (42454) 4134 T-3 (0.5"/minute in PA 259&deg), which is now visible as a bright dot among shorter star trails. "The two minor planets passed each other by about 18" about 1/2 hour after the last image was taken, at ~01:14 UT on 2004 Octobe

texts.full_text: of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as the bristly wolfstail. It is found at high elevations in dry areas of the south western United States, as well as in Bolivia and Argentina. Description Lycurus setosus is a perennial mountain grass with a tufted habit. The erect stems have several nodes and grow from to in height and may have a few branches. The leaf blades are glabrous and grow up to long but only wide. They are rough or bristly and have a white midrib. The inflorescence is an open panicle that grows at the end of each stem, measuring from . Each spikelet has one floret with two lodicules beneath it; these measure about , while there may be up to three stamens. The glumes are unequal in size and have long hairs on their keels. Distribution Lycurus setosus is found at high elevations (from 1,500-4,000 m) across the south western United States as well as Bolivia and Argentina.[2] In North America it can be seen growing alongside species such as Muhlenbergia pauciflora.

Today we visited a "tent city." Families who lost their homes have made homes out of donated Coleman tents and visqueen. Hopefully this will last because I'm looking at a lot of airport time in 2017 . . . but we'll get to that momentarily. Currently, I'm in Manta, Ecuador with a good friend and co-laborer Austin Smith. Austin is a church planter in Vermont. He and his family worked alongside my family in the early stages of planting Pueblo de Dios in Memphis. We are here for two reasons: 1) Austin used to live here and needs to connect with loved ones after the earthquake. 2) We are looking to develop partnerships and, perhaps, widen the scope of our training work in Ecuador. We'll be working in a tent city this afternoon. I'll continue to update with stories and pictures. In the meantime, we appreciate your prayers and support. The laws of the state where the couple is located are applicable at the time of divorce and not where the couple got married. All of the states consider the divorces accorded by other states. All states have a minimum amount of residence time that a couple must complete before being for filing a divorce. Although some states have a mandated policy regarding a minimum separation period before divorce, most of the states allow the respective divorce based on reconcilable differences and loss of affection. Legal Grounds for Divorce Though the laws of divorce vary between states but the two factors of divorce are fault-based and no-fault divorce. Fault-based divorces are given a waiting period to seek issues in hopes of affecting the final decisions relating to child custody, child support, and alimony, etc. A court always takes into account the behavior of two parties in the situation regarding handling matters like property and over separation and debts. texts.full_text: assign a value to a constant property at any point during initialization, as long as it is set to a definite value by the time initialization finishes. Once a constant property is assigned a value, it can’t be further modified. for class instances, a constant property can only be modified during initialization by the class that introduces it. It cannot be modified by a subclass. A: The rule of thumb is: If you have let, you need to initialize it (even if it is optional). Eg : let email: String If you have a non optional var you need to initialize. Eg var email: String If you have an optional var you don't need to initialize it. Eg var email: String? Five of 156 (3.2%) dogs received a blood transfusion; these 5 dogs were among the 12 dogs that had hemorrhage listed. texts.full_text: etting the 2005 EE Times ACE Award for Most Promising New Technology, Molecular Imprints Inc. has garnered support for its groundbreaking step-and-flash imprint lithography (S-FIL) among its peers, its expanding customer base and its funding sources. It has also pioneered two applications for the technology--solid-state lights and hard disks--and has demonstratedthe feasibility of using S-FIL to produce both high-density NAND flash memory chips, as well as solid-state lighting modules. The company's approach allows it to use a mask for multiple layers in one lithography process and is not limited by the diffraction limits associated with conventional photolithographic processes. Molecular Imprints has been able to demonstrate its technology on several fronts since winning last year’s ACE Award, which recognizes companies that are expected to be leaders within their respective markets. The company's work was singled out for recognition at a time when molecular imprinting and related technologies have become increasingly popular as the semiconductor industry continues to push Moore's Law. The S-FIL technology allows manufacturers of high-density NAND flash memory chips, such as sanDisk Corp., to achieve 50nm features on silicon wafers using only one mask. In addition it has allowed Toshiba to use a single master mold for multiple layers in the fabrication process without any loss of resolution. In fact, S-FIL is expected to be able to produce high-density NAND flash memory chips with resolutions that are 10 times finer than what can currently by produced using conventional lithography. This would allow manufacturers such as SanDisk and Toshiba not only to increase the density on a chip but also reduce its size, which in turn could lower power consumption. The technology has been used for years at Molecular Imprints' sister company, Nanometrics Inc., where it is known by another name: nanotool lithography. It allows manufacturers of high-density NAND flash memory chips to achieve 50nm features on silicon wafers using only one mask and without any loss in resolution. The technolOgy has been demonstrated at the National Chips Technology Center

texts.full_text: . Therefore, phthalate metabolites have been used extensively as exposure biomarkers ([@b17-ehp-118-1748]). However, personal exposure to phthalates is likely to vary over time as a result of changes in the use of perticulars and lifestyle habits. This variation can make it challenging for researchers to accurately assess long-term health risks associated with different types of phthalates or their mixtures. It's also important to note that some studies suggest potential associations between certain phthalate metabolites and adverse health outcomes, such as endocrine disruption in children and reproductive toxicity ([@b17-ehp-118-1748]; [@b23-ehp-118-1748]). Despite the widespread use of personal care products containing phthalates and their potential for exposure through various environmental pathways, there is still a need to better understand how these chemicals interact with other chemical compounds or stressors in real-world settings. This could involve investigating factors such as individual susceptibility, co-exposure scenarios (e.g., multiple phthalate metabolites), and the cumulative effects of long-term exposure on human health. In conclusion, while urinary phthalate metabolite concentrations are valuable for assessing population exposures to these chemicals, further research is needed to clarify their implications in terms of both potential risks and individual susceptibility patterns. This could help inform more targeted regulatory actions or public health interventions

When you tried to delete the branch perbaikan_1 on the remote repository, you got the error message "error: src refspec perbaikan_1 does not match any." This is because the branch perbaikan_1 on the remote repository is not a local branch, but a remote tracking branch. When you delete a local branch, the tracking references to the remote branch on the local repository are not automatically deleted. This is because the tracking references are stored in the local repository's remote tracking branch, not in the local branch. To delete the remote branch, you need to delete the tracking references to the branch on the local repository, not the branch itself. This is why you are getting the error message. texts.full_text: talk 5 November 2012Sebastian Vettel is beginning to believe that he has all but sealeda third F1 world championship,and admits thatit would be nice to wrap itup athis 100th grand prix. The German appeared to have allowed main rival Fernando Alonso aglimpse of a reprieve when he stopped ontrackat the endof qualifyingon Saturdayevening. The ensuing technical checks failed toprovide an adequate fuel sample for the scrutineers and Vettel was put to the back of the grid. After opting to start from the pit-lane following a series of set-up changes,the Red Bull came scorching through the field,eventually claimingthird place, one spot behind Alonso.What began as a damage limitation exercise resulted in just athree-point cut in Vettel's championship advantage, leaving him tenahead withtwo rounds remaining, and, on the podium,he said: "Itwas notan easy race forus today but we were able to fight back. The carfelt good from lapone so I think it shows that evenif youstart at theback of the grid or inthe pit-lane there isalways a chance." Looking ahead to the remaining races, Vettel acknowledged the challenge posed by Alonso and his Ferrari team but remained confident. "Fernando has been very strong allyear long," hesaid. "But we have shown that even if thingsgo wrong for us, like theydidtoday,wecan still fight back." Witha ten-point lead in thechampionshipand two races left to run, Vettel is well placed tosecure his third title. And withAlonso's car sufferingfrom reliability issues inrecent weeks, it seems that only a majormishap could prevent Vettel from taking home another worldchampionship trop

texts.full_text: his supremacy. He defeated all monsters and titans and established order in the world (Cosmos). The most important traits that characterized Zeus were wisdom and justice. He became the guardian of justice, unlike Cronus and UraNus, who were driven by the fear of losing their power. In addition, Zeus was able to bring the law into the world and became the principle of life. Through wisdom, thoughtfulness, and loyalty to his commitments, Zeus was able to maintain order in the world and the appreciation of fellow gods (Hesiod 85). However, he had certain similarities with Cronus and Uranus in the treatment of children. When Zeus was told that Metis would give life to the child who would take the power of Zeus, he swallowed Metis (Hesiod 86). Nevertheless, Zeus himself gave birth to the child (Athena), and Metis remained in his head giving Zeus advice to drive his decision-making. Conclusion Thus, it can be concluded that despite the existing similarities between Zeus, Cronus, and Uranus, the lord of the world was very different from them. He did not direct his decisions by guile but used force that he had as well as wisdom. He did not intend to concentrate all the power in his hands and received it by casting lots with the fellow gods and winning their loyalty. After Zeus had come to power, the epoch of terror ceased, and the order and justice were introduced. For these reasons, he was able to remain in charge of the gods although he had faced a number of hurdles on this way. Work Cited Hesiod. Works and Days and Theogony. Translated by Stanley Lombardo and Robert Lamberton, Hackett Publishing Company, 1993. This essay on Works and Days and Theogony: Zeus was written and submitted by your fellow student. texts.full_text: Jobs Contact Us Meet Amanda 07.02.13 Career & Finances Sara Ziff: Changing the Modeling Industry from the Inside Out BY Kay Montano The Model Alliance (MA) is a not-for-profit labor group for models working in the American fashion industry. Founded in 2012 by Sara Ziff, with the support of other models and the Fashion Law Institute at Fordham Law School, the organization offers workshops as well as a grievance reporting and advice service to its members. Models have an industry voice through the MA. Forexample, they can use this platform to discuss issues like fair wages, working conditions, health insurance benefits, rights regarding contracts or abuse from photographers/agents etc., helping them address any grievances directly with their agencies without fear of retribution; thus creating a safer environment for all parties involved in the fashion industry. The organization also works towards raising awareness about child labor laws within modeling and advocating for legislation that would protect models' interests better than existing ones do today – ultimately pushing forward toward an equitable system where everyone gets treated fairly regardless if they are established top model or just starting out! In addition to all these efforts, the Model Alliance has also launched initiatives such as 'The Fashion Industry Charter For Change', which aims at creating a more ethical and responsible industry by setting clear guidelines for brands & agencies on issues like diversity inclusion within their teams; fair payment practices among others. texts.full_text: humor. Nested PCRs carried out using published methods were optimized for maximum sensitivity and specificity. Five pairs of oligonucleotide primers, directed against the B1, p30, and ribosomal genes, were used and compared to determine which sequences were most effective in detecting T. gondii DNA. Methods were developed with DNA templates in water and were subsequently applied to both normal and inflamed aqueous. After one round of PCR amplification, P30 and ribosomal primers were able to detect 1 pg genomic T. gondii DNA per reaction, while B1 primers detected 10 pg genomic DNA per reaction. Nested PCR increased the sensitivity of all primer pairs, with detection limits ranging from 0.01 to 1 fg genomic DNA per reaction.

Ulawun volcano, also known as the Father, rises above the north coast of the island of New Britain acrosS a low saddle NE of Bamus volcano, the South Son. The upper 1000 m of the 2334-m-high Ulawun volcano is unvegetated. A prominent E-W-trending escarpment on the south marks the boundary between steep-walled basaltic lava flows and andesitic lava flows of more recent origin. Ulawun has a large crater with five overlapping cones, four of which have active vent areas, which have produced Plinian eruptions during historical times. The main edifice of the volcano was constructed by an early shield stage that had an estimated volume of 1 cubic kilometer (km³), followed by the andesitic stage in which three large lobate lava flows extended to the sea on the northern slopes. Historical records suggest that Ulawun has been relatively active since the arrival of European explorers around 200 years ago. texts.full_text: more binary variables. In your problem, introduce a new collection of 0-1 variables $u$, where $u_{i,j,k,l,m,n}=x_{i,j}y_{k,l}z_{m,n}$ Replace each product of three 0-1 variables in the original problem with the corresponding element of $u$. You'll also have to introduce linear constraints to enforce $u_{i,j,k,l,m,n}=x_{i,j}y_{k,l}z_{m,n}$. Similarly, you'll need $u$ entries corresponding to products of pairs $u_{i,j,k,l}=x_{i,j}y_{k,l}$, and pairs of $xz$ and $yz$. Your problem is now a 0-1 integer linear programming problem in the $u$ variables. On the surface, this would seem to be hopeless because it would require millions of 0-1 variables in $u$. However, after examining your constraints and objective, it's clear that not all of the possible products of $x$, $y$, and $z$ binary variables actually appear in the constraints and objective. In fact, only $x_{i,j}$, $y_{i,j}$ and $z_{i,j}$ ever appear together in a product in a constraint or objective. Thus you will be able to dramatically reduce the number of 0-1 variables to $3 \times 120 + 3 \times 120 + 120=840$ 0-1 variables. (This comes from 120 $x_{i,j}$ variables, 120 $y_{i,j}$ variables, 120 $z_{i,j}$ variables, 120 $x_{i,j}y_{i,j}$ variables, 120 $x_{i,j}z_{i,j}$ variables, 120 $y_{i,j}z_{i,j}$ variables, and 120 $x_{i,j}y_{i,j}z_{i,j}$ variables.) Is there any tool that is able to automatically solve this problem? There are many software packages for integer linear programming that should be able to handle the linearized reformulation. There are lots of software packages that can deal with general 0-1 mixed integer nonlinear programming problems by using branch-and-bound and/or outer-approximation methods. Rajaratnam School of International Studies (RSIS) > RSIS Working Papers > View Item The domestic political origins of global financial standards : Agrarian influence and the creation of U.S. securities regulations Show full item record Title: The domestic political origins of global financial standards : Agrarian influence and the creation of U.S. securities regulations Author: Richard W. Carney Copyright year: 2010 Abstract: What are the political origins of America’s securities regulations? In contrast to What are the political origins of America’s securities regulations? In contrast to the prevalent view that these regulations were primarily driven by the need to stabilize financial markets and promote international trade, this paper argues that the origins of U.S. securities regulations can be traced back to domestic political factors, particularly the agrarian interests and their political influence. During the early 20th century, the agricultural sector constituted a significant portion of the U.S. economy. Farmers, as a major voting bloc, held considerable sway in the political landscape. Their economic hardships, particularly the farm debt crisis, led them to demand regulatory reforms to protect their interests. As a result, progressive politicians and agrarian activists pushed for the enactment of federal legislation to regulate the stock market. They believed that such regulations would curb the manipulations and excesses of the financial markets, which they saw as contributing to the agricultural sector's economic difficulties. This paper will explore the intertwined relationship between agrarian politics and the development of U.S. securities regulations. It will examine the political debates, the legislative process, and the key players who shaped the contours of the Securities Act of 1933 and the Securities Exchange Act of 1934.
